nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.comment: Accepts JSON: { text (required), model (optional) }. API key via X-API-Key header only. Set EMBEDDINGS_API_KEY env var to enable authentication.

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.comment: API key auth (if EMBEDDINGS_API_KEY set). Validates text (max 32768 chars), model pattern.

nodes.name: Check Valid
nodes.comment: Branches based on validation result. True = valid input, continue to API. False = validation/auth failed.

nodes.name: Embeddings API
nodes.comment: Calls embeddings service with validated inputs. 60 second timeout.

parameters.text:
={{ '*Embeddings Generation Failed* ❌

**Error:** ' + (($json.error || $input.all()[0]?.error?.message || $input.all()[0]?.error?.description || 'Unknown error')).toString().slice(0, 997).trimEnd() + '

Please check:
- Embeddings service is running
- Text is provided and under 32768 characters
- Model name is valid
- API key is correct (if configured)' }}

nodes.name: Discord Error
nodes.comment: Catches validation/auth errors and API failures.
